TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Seediq Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://trv.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Paul Biya == Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 2 jiyax 13 ka Paul Biya ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cameron ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Biya, pnaah hngkawas 1982 idas 11 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Paul Biya Paul Biya(kngkawas 1933 idas 2 diyax 13－), Cameroonian na Tucayce, Soto Cameroonian saya, snpeyyah kngkawas 1975 pnrdingan u ida Paul Biya ka Cameroonian na knbaraw balay mdudul niya, Paul Biya uri ka knkana bnkuwan qnlangan tu2 knrudan niya qnlhangan mpdudul niya. Kndusan niya Paul Biya u mntuting alang Mumeka. Paul Biya pa kngkawas 1961 cida u snpeyyah Pyasan Tubeyhing Paris Seyji na Pnluban Qnlangan Seymung mnhdu muyas. Tu1 qridin niya Paul Biya ka Jeanne-Irène Biya, mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 7 diyax 29 mrdang, ddha dha u ini tquli laqi. Kngkawas 1994 idas 4 diyax 23 cida, Paul Biya pa tuhuy swayi hiya 38 knkawas na Chantal Biya msturung, ddha dha pa tnquli 2 laqi. Kndusan Seyji niya Mniq Ahmadou Ahicho ka ngalan Soto kngkkawas cida, wada pkrana balay hnyuwan Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1975 cida ngalan Sotohu Misucang ka Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1975 dhuq kngkawas 1982 cida daw ngalan Congri. Wada kasi krdang kngkawas 1982 cida ka Ahicho daw, Paul Biya ka rmirih Soto da. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq 1984 cida Paul Biya mniq kcka mtdiyal ppluk biyax u wada sndhu hnyuwan niya Soto. Kngkkawas 1980 cida, Paul Biya u mniq 1 Pnwaya Tang muda knpriyux quri uuda seyji 4 DX4EE. Kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan cida, wada niqan mchdil uuda daw muru Pnwaya Knou Tang ka hiya. Kngkawas 1992 cida, Paul Biya pa wada muri bay mangal Soto seyngkyo. Babaw niya daw wada mniq kngkawas 1997, kngkawas 2004 mi kngkawas 2011 Paul Biya u wada krinah balay mbiyax mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kiya mi kcka qnlhangan Hataypay mi qnlhangan tuiwil ka ngalan dha kcka seykyo niyi pa niqan smliq waya mi mqbling nuda dha. Ddulan quri Paul Biya ka Cameroonian mi Cameroonian brah Conhcukwo——France Smriq kari Ana so hmuya mbiyax bay muda psbalay knpriyux quri uuda seyji ka Paul Biya, binaw seyhu Paul Biya u ida muda snturung smriq kari quri Weycweyn Cuyi. Mniq kcka keyngpo u, Paul Biya u muda pkrana Biyax Singcng mi Biyax Phiyu Waya, iyux pkrana quri Biyax Shwa mi ddulun niya. Wana mniq dnurun Paul Biya u kiya ka niqan biyax muda smliq waya keyngpo muda singsa. Dndulan niya Paul Biya ka cngtang Cameroonian Jnmin Mincu Undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balay Kwohuy nina (mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 7 mnuda ka kcka Kwohuy seyngkyo u, 163 hiyi ka knkana giying u tang dha pa wada mangal 153 hiyi giying), so niyi ka mnuda Kwohuy u pndungus bay sntangan niya Paul Biya u sndhu bay lxanan horicu. Kngkawas 2009 cida, America Singbung Cac"Parade"u wada dha ngalan"Qnlangan tubrah 20 bang Tucayce" na tu19. Kngkawas 2010 idas 11, mpatas niya Cameroonian ka Bertrand Teyou u mnatas 1 patas, kcka niya u matas quri ndanan qridin niya Chantal Biya u snpeyyah qrinuc na pingmin wada mnqnlhangan tu1 Hujn. Babaw niya daw Teyou u alaw 'Tnseyyax sediq, mi pssli 'Smliq waya mssli' (tameysu muda mn1 ptrawah bay uuda smpu patas) na cumi wada pthmuk sapah kung 2 knkawas. Amnesty International mi PEN u muda knciyuk hiya mi wada qrapun, Amnesty International u wada niya ngalan ryosing cumi ka hangan niya uri. Kngkawas 2011 idas 5 diyax 2, alaw PEN na London cida kay smruwa muway hbangan sanun pqita narux hiyi niya mi wada plaxun. Pnyahan pnatas 郭明正 老師
S.PHON: == paul bija == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka paul bija ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦaməɾon ta sajaŋ o kija ka paul bija, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. paul bija paul bija(kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ***), ʦaməɾoonian na tuʦajʦə, soto ʦaməɾoonian saja, snpəjaħ kŋkawas **** pnɾdiŋan u ida paul bija ka ʦaməɾoonian na knbaɾaw balaj mdudul nija, paul bija uɾi ka knkana bnkuwan qnlaŋan tu* knɾudan nija qnlħaŋan mpdudul nija. kndusan nija paul bija u mntutiŋ alaŋ muməka. paul bija pa kŋkawas **** ʦida u snpəjaħ pjasan tubəħiŋ paɾis səɟi na pnluban qnlaŋan səmuŋ mnħdu mujas. tu* qɾidin nija paul bija ka ɟəannə-iɾ*nə bija, mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mɾdaŋ, ddħa dħa u ini tquli laqi. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** ʦida, paul bija pa tuħuj swaji ħija ** knkawas na ʦħantal bija mstuɾuŋ, ddħa dħa pa tnquli * laqi. kndusan səɟi nija mniq aħmadou aħiʦħo ka ŋalan soto kŋkkawas ʦida, wada pkɾana balaj ħnjuwan paul bija. kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas **** ʦida ŋalan sotoħu misuʦaŋ ka paul bija. kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas **** ʦida daw ŋalan ʦoŋɾi. wada kasi kɾdaŋ kŋkawas **** ʦida ka aħiʦħo daw, paul bija ka ɾmiɾiħ soto da. kŋkawas **** dħuq **** ʦida paul bija mniq kʦka mtdijal ppluk bijax u wada sndħu ħnjuwan nija soto. kŋkkawas **** ʦida, paul bija u mniq * pnwaja taŋ muda knpɾijux quɾi uuda səɟi * dx*əə. kŋkkawas **** pnɾdiŋan ʦida, wada niqan mʦħdil uuda daw muɾu pnwaja knou taŋ ka ħija. kŋkawas **** ʦida, paul bija pa wada muɾi baj maŋal soto səŋkjo. babaw nija daw wada mniq kŋkawas ****, kŋkawas **** mi kŋkawas **** paul bija u wada kɾinaħ balaj mbijax maŋal lmutuʦ qpaħun soto. kija mi kʦka qnlħaŋan ħatajpaj mi qnlħaŋan tuiwil ka ŋalan dħa kʦka səkjo niji pa niqan smliq waja mi mqbliŋ nuda dħa. ddulan quɾi paul bija ka ʦaməɾoonian mi ʦaməɾoonian bɾaħ ʦonħʦukwo***ɾanʦə smɾiq kaɾi ana so ħmuja mbijax baj muda psbalaj knpɾijux quɾi uuda səɟi ka paul bija, binaw səħu paul bija u ida muda sntuɾuŋ smɾiq kaɾi quɾi wəʦwən ʦuji. mniq kʦka kəŋpo u, paul bija u muda pkɾana bijax siŋʦŋ mi bijax pħiju waja, ijux pkɾana quɾi bijax sħwa mi ddulun nija. wana mniq dnuɾun paul bija u kija ka niqan bijax muda smliq waja kəŋpo muda siŋsa. dndulan nija paul bija ka ʦŋtaŋ ʦaməɾoonian ɟnmin minʦu undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balaj kwoħuj nina (mniq kŋkawas **** idas * mnuda ka kʦka kwoħuj səŋkjo u, *** ħiji ka knkana gijiŋ u taŋ dħa pa wada maŋal *** ħiji gijiŋ), so niji ka mnuda kwoħuj u pnduŋus baj sntaŋan nija paul bija u sndħu baj lxanan ħoɾiʦu. kŋkawas **** ʦida, aməɾiʦa siŋbuŋ ʦaʦ"paɾadə"u wada dħa ŋalan"qnlaŋan tubɾaħ ** baŋ tuʦajʦə" na tu**. kŋkawas **** idas **, mpatas nija ʦaməɾoonian ka bəɾtɾand təou u mnatas * patas, kʦka nija u matas quɾi ndanan qɾidin nija ʦħantal bija u snpəjaħ qɾinuʦ na piŋmin wada mnqnlħaŋan tu* ħuɟn. babaw nija daw təou u alaw 'tnsəjax sədiq, mi pssli 'smliq waja mssli' (taməsu muda mn* ptɾawaħ baj uuda smpu patas) na ʦumi wada ptħmuk sapaħ kuŋ * knkawas. amnəstj intəɾnational mi pən u muda knʦijuk ħija mi wada qɾapun, amnəstj intəɾnational u wada nija ŋalan ɾjosiŋ ʦumi ka ħaŋan nija uɾi. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, alaw pən na london ʦida kaj smɾuwa muwaj ħbaŋan sanun pqita naɾux ħiji nija mi wada plaxun. pnjaħan pnatas *** **
S.FORM: == Paul Biya == Mntucing hngkawas 1933 idas 2 jiyax 13 ka Paul Biya ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Cameron ta sayang o kiya ka Paul Biya, pnaah hngkawas 1982 idas 11 jiyax 6 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Paul Biya Paul Biya(kngkawas 1933 idas 2 diyax 13－), Cameroonian na Tucayce, Soto Cameroonian saya, snpeyyah kngkawas 1975 pnrdingan u ida Paul Biya ka Cameroonian na knbaraw balay mdudul niya, Paul Biya uri ka knkana bnkuwan qnlangan tu2 knrudan niya qnlhangan mpdudul niya. Kndusan niya Paul Biya u mntuting alang Mumeka. Paul Biya pa kngkawas 1961 cida u snpeyyah Pyasan Tubeyhing Paris Seyji na Pnluban Qnlangan Seymung mnhdu muyas. Tu1 qridin niya Paul Biya ka Jeanne-Irène Biya, mniq kngkawas 1992 idas 7 diyax 29 mrdang, ddha dha u ini tquli laqi. Kngkawas 1994 idas 4 diyax 23 cida, Paul Biya pa tuhuy swayi hiya 38 knkawas na Chantal Biya msturung, ddha dha pa tnquli 2 laqi. Kndusan Seyji niya Mniq Ahmadou Ahicho ka ngalan Soto kngkkawas cida, wada pkrana balay hnyuwan Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1968 dhuq kngkawas 1975 cida ngalan Sotohu Misucang ka Paul Biya. Kngkawas 1975 dhuq kngkawas 1982 cida daw ngalan Congri. Wada kasi krdang kngkawas 1982 cida ka Ahicho daw, Paul Biya ka rmirih Soto da. Kngkawas 1983 dhuq 1984 cida Paul Biya mniq kcka mtdiyal ppluk biyax u wada sndhu hnyuwan niya Soto. Kngkkawas 1980 cida, Paul Biya u mniq 1 Pnwaya Tang muda knpriyux quri uuda seyji 4 DX4EE. Kngkkawas 1990 pnrdingan cida, wada niqan mchdil uuda daw muru Pnwaya Knou Tang ka hiya. Kngkawas 1992 cida, Paul Biya pa wada muri bay mangal Soto seyngkyo. Babaw niya daw wada mniq kngkawas 1997, kngkawas 2004 mi kngkawas 2011 Paul Biya u wada krinah balay mbiyax mangal lmutuc qpahun Soto. Kiya mi kcka qnlhangan Hataypay mi qnlhangan tuiwil ka ngalan dha kcka seykyo niyi pa niqan smliq waya mi mqbling nuda dha. Ddulan quri Paul Biya ka Cameroonian mi Cameroonian brah Conhcukwo——France Smriq kari Ana so hmuya mbiyax bay muda psbalay knpriyux quri uuda seyji ka Paul Biya, binaw seyhu Paul Biya u ida muda snturung smriq kari quri Weycweyn Cuyi. Mniq kcka keyngpo u, Paul Biya u muda pkrana Biyax Singcng mi Biyax Phiyu Waya, iyux pkrana quri Biyax Shwa mi ddulun niya. Wana mniq dnurun Paul Biya u kiya ka niqan biyax muda smliq waya keyngpo muda singsa. Dndulan niya Paul Biya ka cngtang Cameroonian Jnmin Mincu Undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balay Kwohuy nina (mniq kngkawas 2007 idas 7 mnuda ka kcka Kwohuy seyngkyo u, 163 hiyi ka knkana giying u tang dha pa wada mangal 153 hiyi giying), so niyi ka mnuda Kwohuy u pndungus bay sntangan niya Paul Biya u sndhu bay lxanan horicu. Kngkawas 2009 cida, America Singbung Cac"Parade"u wada dha ngalan"Qnlangan tubrah 20 bang Tucayce" na tu19. Kngkawas 2010 idas 11, mpatas niya Cameroonian ka Bertrand Teyou u mnatas 1 patas, kcka niya u matas quri ndanan qridin niya Chantal Biya u snpeyyah qrinuc na pingmin wada mnqnlhangan tu1 Hujn. Babaw niya daw Teyou u alaw 'Tnseyyax sediq, mi pssli 'Smliq waya mssli' (tameysu muda mn1 ptrawah bay uuda smpu patas) na cumi wada pthmuk sapah kung 2 knkawas. Amnesty International mi PEN u muda knciyuk hiya mi wada qrapun, Amnesty International u wada niya ngalan ryosing cumi ka hangan niya uri. Kngkawas 2011 idas 5 diyax 2, alaw PEN na London cida kay smruwa muway hbangan sanun pqita narux hiyi niya mi wada plaxun. Pnyahan pnatas 郭明正 老師
S.PHON: == paul bija == mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** ka paul bija ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan ʦaməɾon ta sajaŋ o kija ka paul bija, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax * pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. paul bija paul bija(kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ***), ʦaməɾoonian na tuʦajʦə, soto ʦaməɾoonian saja, snpəjaħ kŋkawas **** pnɾdiŋan u ida paul bija ka ʦaməɾoonian na knbaɾaw balaj mdudul nija, paul bija uɾi ka knkana bnkuwan qnlaŋan tu* knɾudan nija qnlħaŋan mpdudul nija. kndusan nija paul bija u mntutiŋ alaŋ muməka. paul bija pa kŋkawas **** ʦida u snpəjaħ pjasan tubəħiŋ paɾis səɟi na pnluban qnlaŋan səmuŋ mnħdu mujas. tu* qɾidin nija paul bija ka ɟəannə-iɾ*nə bija, mniq kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** mɾdaŋ, ddħa dħa u ini tquli laqi. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax ** ʦida, paul bija pa tuħuj swaji ħija ** knkawas na ʦħantal bija mstuɾuŋ, ddħa dħa pa tnquli * laqi. kndusan səɟi nija mniq aħmadou aħiʦħo ka ŋalan soto kŋkkawas ʦida, wada pkɾana balaj ħnjuwan paul bija. kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas **** ʦida ŋalan sotoħu misuʦaŋ ka paul bija. kŋkawas **** dħuq kŋkawas **** ʦida daw ŋalan ʦoŋɾi. wada kasi kɾdaŋ kŋkawas **** ʦida ka aħiʦħo daw, paul bija ka ɾmiɾiħ soto da. kŋkawas **** dħuq **** ʦida paul bija mniq kʦka mtdijal ppluk bijax u wada sndħu ħnjuwan nija soto. kŋkkawas **** ʦida, paul bija u mniq * pnwaja taŋ muda knpɾijux quɾi uuda səɟi * dx*əə. kŋkkawas **** pnɾdiŋan ʦida, wada niqan mʦħdil uuda daw muɾu pnwaja knou taŋ ka ħija. kŋkawas **** ʦida, paul bija pa wada muɾi baj maŋal soto səŋkjo. babaw nija daw wada mniq kŋkawas ****, kŋkawas **** mi kŋkawas **** paul bija u wada kɾinaħ balaj mbijax maŋal lmutuʦ qpaħun soto. kija mi kʦka qnlħaŋan ħatajpaj mi qnlħaŋan tuiwil ka ŋalan dħa kʦka səkjo niji pa niqan smliq waja mi mqbliŋ nuda dħa. ddulan quɾi paul bija ka ʦaməɾoonian mi ʦaməɾoonian bɾaħ ʦonħʦukwo***ɾanʦə smɾiq kaɾi ana so ħmuja mbijax baj muda psbalaj knpɾijux quɾi uuda səɟi ka paul bija, binaw səħu paul bija u ida muda sntuɾuŋ smɾiq kaɾi quɾi wəʦwən ʦuji. mniq kʦka kəŋpo u, paul bija u muda pkɾana bijax siŋʦŋ mi bijax pħiju waja, ijux pkɾana quɾi bijax sħwa mi ddulun nija. wana mniq dnuɾun paul bija u kija ka niqan bijax muda smliq waja kəŋpo muda siŋsa. dndulan nija paul bija ka ʦŋtaŋ ʦaməɾoonian ɟnmin minʦu undo pa ida nanaq dmudul balaj kwoħuj nina (mniq kŋkawas **** idas * mnuda ka kʦka kwoħuj səŋkjo u, *** ħiji ka knkana gijiŋ u taŋ dħa pa wada maŋal *** ħiji gijiŋ), so niji ka mnuda kwoħuj u pnduŋus baj sntaŋan nija paul bija u sndħu baj lxanan ħoɾiʦu. kŋkawas **** ʦida, aməɾiʦa siŋbuŋ ʦaʦ"paɾadə"u wada dħa ŋalan"qnlaŋan tubɾaħ ** baŋ tuʦajʦə" na tu**. kŋkawas **** idas **, mpatas nija ʦaməɾoonian ka bəɾtɾand təou u mnatas * patas, kʦka nija u matas quɾi ndanan qɾidin nija ʦħantal bija u snpəjaħ qɾinuʦ na piŋmin wada mnqnlħaŋan tu* ħuɟn. babaw nija daw təou u alaw 'tnsəjax sədiq, mi pssli 'smliq waja mssli' (taməsu muda mn* ptɾawaħ baj uuda smpu patas) na ʦumi wada ptħmuk sapaħ kuŋ * knkawas. amnəstj intəɾnational mi pən u muda knʦijuk ħija mi wada qɾapun, amnəstj intəɾnational u wada nija ŋalan ɾjosiŋ ʦumi ka ħaŋan nija uɾi. kŋkawas **** idas * dijax *, alaw pən na london ʦida kaj smɾuwa muwaj ħbaŋan sanun pqita naɾux ħiji nija mi wada plaxun. pnjaħan pnatas *** **
